query:
CREATE TABLE `llm_usage_logs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`caller` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`prompt_tokens` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`completion_tokens` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`total_tokens` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`cached` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`duration_ms` int DEFAULT 0,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `llm_usage_logs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3xr15hTS159DZY6.8d8bea4325aa --database YnRsYg5SNCYEtebW9rjF7K --execute CREATE TABLE `llm_usage_logs` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`caller` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`prompt_tokens` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`completion_tokens` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`total_tokens` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
	`cached` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
	`duration_ms` int DEFAULT 0,
	`created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `llm_usage_logs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
